query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, a.id as atollId, a.name as atollName 
FROM places p 
JOIN atolls a ON p.atollId = a.id
LEFT JOIN island_guides ig ON p.name = ig.name
WHERE p.type = 'island' AND ig.id IS NULL
ORDER BY a.name, p.name;
